title: Logical closure: one r>=3 counterexample disproves contractibility in general

comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body: **Gap E (logical closure).** State explicitly that the question 'Is $F_s$ contractible?' is universally quantified over all reducible quasi-reduced words $s$, so that a single counterexample answers it with **No**. Record that the witness $w=aa^{-1}bb^{-1}aa^{-1}cc^{-1}aa^{-1}$ requires $r\ge3$ (three distinct generators $a,b,c$). Since $F_w\cong S^2$, we have $\pi_2(F_w)=\mathbb{Z}\neq0$, so $F_w$ is not even 2-connected, a fortiori not contractible. Conclude the answer is No.
